Who I Am

Creative thinker.
Human-first storyteller.

I'm a digital marketing and creative media professional completing an MA in Digital Media & Creative Industries at the University of Birmingham — with a BA in Business Administration (Marketing) from India.

I believe the best content isn't the loudest — it's the most honest. My work is rooted in listening: to communities, to audiences, and to the stories that don't always get told.

From running campaigns for a Birmingham arts charity to producing a documentary on human connection, I bring a strategic eye and a creative heart to everything I make.

MA Dissertation · Featured Project

Everyone has a story.
Not everyone tells it the same way.

My MA dissertation is a creative documentary born out of my internship at Arts Uplift — a charity that brings elderly people together through art and creativity.

"For some period you are alone — but not always. You eventually end up finding your people."

The project explores how loneliness transforms into connection when people are given space to express themselves — through words, painting, movement, or music.

Documentary FilmCommunity StorytellingElderly WellbeingArts Uplift UKIn Progress · 2026

Theme

Loneliness, human connection, and the many languages of self-expression — verbal, visual, and creative.

Methodology

Documentary filmmaking, community interviews, and observational storytelling within Arts Uplift sessions.

Key Insight

Introverts and extroverts both have rich inner worlds — they simply need different doors to share them through.

Progress — filming underway

Expected completion: 2026
